title: New mayor wants to serve and work hard to gain trust and keep it
description: GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - No voting was...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS AND VIDEO - No voting was necessary for the mayoral position in George.


> DA's Jackie von Brandis is currently delivering her first mayoral speech after being the only valid nomination received from political parties.


The ANC nominated Gert van Niekerk of FF Plus, but he is not at today's meeting.

Von Brandis said she will make it her purpose to deliver services to all citizens, including those in remote areas.

"I want to assure you that this is a governance for each and everyone in George," said Von Brandis. She said she needs councillors to get involved in communities. "We need to do this together."

Deputy Mayor Raybin Figland (left) next to the new mayor of George Jackie von Brandis.

George Mayor Jackie von Brandis

VIDEO:

Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

Von Brandis during her first mayoral speech, at George Civic Centre.

- EFF ask for caucus to have proceedings explained by colleagues in Cape Town
- Fifth caucus underway within first three hours of council
- New councillors inaugurated
- All eyes on today's Special Council Meeting with inauguration of new mayor

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
